title: Rapid Growth Phase
subtitle: Gaining weight and strength
description: By week 31, your baby is growing rapidly and gaining more weight. The brain continues to develop, and movements remain strong, though space inside the womb is becoming limited.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements remain strong but may feel different due to less space
You may experience increased physical discomfort or breathlessness
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Rest adequately and avoid prolonged standing

medical_checkups.note: Monitoring becomes more frequent as you approach the final weeks.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks maternal health and fetal growth

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may begin scheduling more frequent visits to closely monitor your progress.

important_note: Changes in movement patterns may occur due to limited space, but regular activity should continue.
reassurance: Your baby is growing stronger and preparing for birth.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice reduced or unusual movements.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports healthy weight gain and development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored more frequently during this stage.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports increased blood volume and oxygen supply.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential as your body adapts to increased demands.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring may become more frequent.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing development and metabolic function.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As growth accelerates, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support a healthy final stage.
